入手方法: ミッション: Reach player level 3 - Elite Deck Gift Missions

カードの効果.発動効果: Put 2 random Pokémon from your deck into your hand. For each Pokémon you put into your hand in this way, choose a Pokémon to shuffle from your hand into your deck.
カードの効果.追加ルール: You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.
